## platy app sync

Reconcile applications.yaml with the gateway, applying only what changed

```
platy app sync [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help    help for sync
      --prune   delete gateway applications that are no longer in the manifest
```

* [platy app](platy_app.md)	 - Manage application registrations in the gateway registry
